characters.appearance: Young female, slender build, fair complexion, red hair styled in a high bun. She has large green eyes, a small nose, and a soft, friendly face.
characters.wardrobe: White top, gold hoop earrings with a small dangling charm.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, medium build, fair complexion, short dark hair, and a short beard. He has dark eyes and thick eyebrows.
characters.wardrobe: Dark blue collared shirt, white wireless earbuds.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Do you speak English? [Do you speak English?]
Character B says: Yes, I know English. [Yes, I know English.]
Character A says: Technically correct है। लेकिन native speakers कहते हैं, 'I speak English'. [Technically it's correct. But native speakers say, 'I speak English'.]
Character B says: I speak English. [I speak English.]
Character A says: How old are you? [How old are you?]
Character B says: I am 24. [I am 24.]
Character A says: Perfect! अब बताओ, What is your name? [Perfect! Now tell me, What is your name?]
Character B says: My name is Gustavo. [My name is Gustavo.]
Character A says: Native speakers अक्सर कहते हैं, 'I'm Gustavo'. [Native speakers often say, 'I'm Gustavo'.]
Character B says: I'm Gustavo. [I'm Gustavo.]
Character A says: Well done! [Well done!]
Character B says: Thank you. पर आप कौन हो? [Thank you. But who are you?]
Character A says: मैं Supernova पर आपकी AI tutor हूँ। हम रोज़ ऐसे ही बात करके English सीख सकते हैं। [I am your AI tutor on Supernova. We can learn English by talking like this every day.]
Character B says: अरे, पर मेरी English तो बहुत basic है। मैं बोल नहीं पाता। [Oh, but my English is very basic. I can't speak.]
Character A says: कोई बात नहीं! मैं आपको हिंदी में समझा कर English बोलना सिखा सकती हूँ। [No worries! I can explain in Hindi and teach you to speak English.]
Character B says: आपको हिंदी आती है? [You know Hindi?]
Character A says: बिलकुल! मैं एक AI हूँ। [Of course! I am an AI.]
Character B says: सही है। मैं अभी app download करता हूँ। [That's great. I'll download the app now.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with an interactive English correction scenario.
- Demonstrates the AI tutor's ability to correct mistakes gently and explain in Hindi.
- Addresses the learner's hesitation about basic English skills.
- Ends with a clear call to action to download the app.
